text: There’s a hush of anticipation in this place – clean, purposeful lines, and glass that separates me from vibrant curiosities inside. My own reflection wavers as I look through. The safety signs and sterile lighting remind me of both order and fragility; this is a space of ideas contained, curated, and waiting to be discovered. I feel a gentle pull of curiosity, a sense of standing at the threshold between the everyday and a more thoughtful engagement with reality.
